name: NUB Userbot
description: A powerful, highly modular, and clean Pyrogram based Telegram Userbot.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from my.telegram.org

BOT_TOKEN.description: Optional: A Bot Token from @BotFather (used for inline bot features)

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Optional: Google Gemini API Key from https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey (needed for AI features)

USERBOT_USERNAME.description: The username of your userbot account (without @) to use in menus

NUB_YTDLP_API_KEY.description: Optional: API Key for NUB_YTDLP to download YouTube videos

NUB_YTDLP_BASE_URL.description: Optional: Base URL for NUB_YTDLP API (defaults to http://api.nubcoders.com)
